visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with her hair in a bun faces the camera, waving her hand with a smile. She is positioned in a room with a white wall and a garment rack filled with various clothes behind her. She wears a cream-colored knitted vest over a white shirt. The lighting is bright and even. (2) She holds a black foundation jar labeled SUQQU. She opens it and uses a flat brush to dip into the cream foundation, then applies several dabs onto her forehead and cheeks. (3) She holds a black bottle of Nicor setting spray and a round cushion puff. She sprays the puff multiple times and then gently pats it all over her face. (4) She picks up a round black powder compact and uses a black puff to apply powder to her face, focusing on the T-zone. (5) She shows a rectangular orange eyeshadow palette (I'M MEME). Using a large colorful brush, she applies blush to her cheeks. She then brings the palette close to the camera, showing four numbered eyeshadow pans. (6) Following the numbers on the palette, she uses small brushes to apply different shades to her eyelids and lower lash line. She also uses a dark shade to fill in her eyebrows. (7) She takes a FreshO2 double-ended lip glaze and applies the mauve color to her lips. She smiles while looking into the camera lens. (8) She holds up a set of mini makeup brushes with colorful handles and a small white cartoon-patterned pouch. She fans out the brushes to show them clearly. (9) The woman smiles and poses to show the completed makeup look. A green 'Done' symbol appears as text at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 5分鐘化妝. (2) [Subtitle]: 很簡單. (3) [Subtitle]: 第一個是底妝. [Slogan]: SUQQU 粉霜. (4) [Subtitle]: 我是用那個SUQQU日本的. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後我會噴上定妝噴霧. [Slogan]: Nicor 定妝噴霧. (6) [Subtitle]: 輕輕拍一拍. (7) [Subtitle]: 再來就是蜜粉啦. [Slogan]: 文森蜜粉. (8) [Subtitle]: 腮紅. [Slogan]: I'M MEME 數字眼影盤. (9) [Subtitle]: 我蠻喜歡這一盤的韓國的 I'm meme. (10) [Subtitle]: 不會化妝的呢 你看它上面有幫你標好. (11) [Subtitle]: 1234 你就按照它那個順序就好了. (12) [Subtitle]: 很方便. (13) [Subtitle]: 現在是1. (14) [Subtitle]: 再來是2的部分. (15) [Subtitle]: 3. (16) [Subtitle]: 深色. (17) [Subtitle]: 點亮亮. (18) [Subtitle]: 順便眉毛. (19) [Subtitle]: (口紅). [Slogan]: FreshO2 雙頭唇釉. (20) [Subtitle]: 跟大家分享一下我的刷具. [Slogan]: LOVELYKITTEN 糖果迷你化妝刷套組. (21) [Subtitle]: 它很小 那我外出帶很方便. (22) [Subtitle]: 然後會有一個小袋子 這樣. (23) [Subtitle]: 抽獎給大家 就是下面留言的話. (24) [Subtitle]: 我們就會抽出9組 直接送給大家. (25) [Subtitle]: 完成✅.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an Asian woman with dark hair tied in a high bun. She wears a cream knitted sweater vest over a white collared shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A room with white walls and a large garment rack filled with various clothes on hangers, suggesting a home studio or closet area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice begins speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic Mandarin Chinese tone, introducing a 5-minute makeup routine. The room is quiet with minimal background hiss. (2) An upbeat pop track with a synthesized melody and a steady 4/4 electronic drum beat fades in. The voice remains the primary focus. (3) A sharp 'spraying' SFX is heard as the woman mentions the setting spray, followed by rhythmic soft thuds from the makeup puff. (4) The speaker's tone remains cheerful and informative as she explains the eyeshadow numbering. The BGM remains consistent in volume and tempo. (5) As the speaker transitions to a giveaway announcement, her vocal arousal increases slightly, and the BGM continues its upbeat loop until the end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Demonstration -> Promotional Giveaway -> Result
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a quick makeup tutorial aimed at beginners, demonstrating a '5-minute' look while strategically endorsing several cosmetic brands and ending with a social media engagement campaign through a giveaway.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator clearly shows brand logos on products, names them in the narration and subtitles, and organizes a giveaway for the brush set.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density, social-native editing style with consistent text overlays to keep viewers engaged during a product-focused tutorial.
